summary: South Bay funding hit a fever pitch this month, with Nexthop AI and MatX each landing half-billion-dollar rounds, while chip and AI startups across San Jose, Santa Clara, and Mountain View pulled in over $3 billion combined. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable or hiring, though two companies are tightening belts. The momentum underscores the Bay's enduring pull for deep-tech capital, even as competition for engineering talent intensifies.
